privileged_info_summary: The task requires adding a new department named 'Mine Safety Division' with short name 'MSD' to an OpenCAD system. These values are consistently specified in the task description, export result script, and verifier logic. OpenCAD-php is a real, publicly available open-source Computer-Aided Dispatch system (archived repository at github.com/opencad-app/OpenCAD-php). The task environment is entirely synthetic, with a fresh OpenCAD instance deployed in Docker containers with a clean database. No external data sources are involved. The metadata claims directly reflect the task requirements and are verified across all implementation files.
